Samara University · Afar Region, Ethiopia

Building Peace
from the Ground Up

The Samara University Peace Forum Union empowers students and institutions to champion dialogue, unity, and civic responsibility across Ethiopia.

✉ Get Involved Our Mission →

Years in Service

🕊 Our Pillars

What We Stand For

Rooted in dialogue, solidarity, and civic action — these are the values that unite us.

🕊

Peace Advocacy

Organizing seminars, mediation workshops, and community dialogues that foster mutual understanding and reconciliation across student communities.

⚖️

Civic Engagement

Connecting students to institutional governance, civic rights, and national policy conversations through structured participation.

🌍

Cultural Unity

Celebrating Ethiopia's diversity through cultural exchange, intercultural dialogue, and shared traditions across all communities.

📚

Education & Research

Publishing resources, conducting research, and creating educational content that advances peacebuilding scholarship in the region.

🤝

Community Networks

Building bridges between universities, NGOs, and government bodies to create sustainable peace infrastructure at scale.

💡

Youth Leadership

Identifying and mentoring the next generation of peacebuilders through leadership programs, internships, and public speaking opportunities.

📰 Latest

News & Updates

View All →

Join the Movement

Ready to Make a Difference?

Connect with thousands of students and contribute to lasting peace in Ethiopia.
